message:
chore: Regenerate test groups for 397 CPython tests

Properly categorize all 397 test files from CPython v3.14.2:

**Core tests (platform-independent): 294 tests total**
- core1.txt: 98 tests (__all__-float)
- core2.txt: 98 tests (flufl-quopri)
- core3.txt: 98 tests (raise-zstd)

**Platform-specific tests: 103 unique tests**
- linux.txt: 18 tests
- macos.txt: 25 tests (unchanged)
- windows.txt: 93 tests

Total: 397 tests (294 core + 103 platform-specific with some overlap)

Previous split had core tests mixed with platform-specific tests.
This regeneration excludes all platform-specific tests from core groups.

Updated CI job names to reflect correct test counts.

files.patch:
@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ jobs:
 
   # Core tests split into 3 parallel jobs for faster CI
   test-metal0-core1:
-    name: Metal0 @core1 (126 tests)
+    name: Metal0 @core1 (98 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 30
 
@@ -62,7 +62,7 @@ jobs:
         timeout-minutes: 30
 
   test-metal0-core2:
-    name: Metal0 @core2 (127 tests)
+    name: Metal0 @core2 (98 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 30
 
@@ -102,7 +102,7 @@ jobs:
         timeout-minutes: 30
 
   test-metal0-core3:
-    name: Metal0 @core3 (127 tests)
+    name: Metal0 @core3 (98 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 30

-    name: Metal0 @linux (17 tests)
+    name: Metal0 @linux (18 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 60
 
@@ -236,7 +236,7 @@ jobs:
         timeout-minutes: 60
 
   test-metal0-windows:
-    name: Metal0 @windows (92 tests)
+    name: Metal0 @windows (93 tests)
     runs-on: windows-latest
     timeout-minutes: 60
 
@@ -300,7 +300,7 @@ jobs:
   # =============================================================================
 
   test-cpython-core1:
-    name: CPython @core1 (126 tests)
+    name: CPython @core1 (98 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 30
 
@@ -340,7 +340,7 @@ jobs:

-    name: CPython @core2 (127 tests)
+    name: CPython @core2 (98 tests)

     timeout-minutes: 30
 
@@ -380,7 +380,7 @@ jobs:
         timeout-minutes: 30
 
   test-cpython-core3:
-    name: CPython @core3 (127 tests)
+    name: CPython @core3 (98 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 30
 
@@ -420,7 +420,7 @@ jobs:
         timeout-minutes: 30
 
   test-cpython-linux:
-    name: CPython @linux (17 tests)
+    name: CPython @linux (18 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 60
 
@@ -500,7 +500,7 @@ jobs:
         timeout-minutes: 60
 
   test-cpython-windows:
-    name: CPython @windows (92 tests)
+    name: CPython @windows (93 tests)
     runs-on: windows-latest
     timeout-minutes: 60
